message:
fix(extensions_js): harden exec_sync arg parsing and subprocess kill logic

Replace serde_json::from_str(&args_json).unwrap_or_default() with proper
.map_err() that returns a JS-visible error message instead of silently
defaulting to an empty vec on parse failure. Add !killed guard checks
before limit_exceeded and timeout branches to prevent re-killing an
already-killed process. Add immediate loop exit via break child.wait()
after kill to stop the polling loop from spinning after termination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
